_note: Reviewer item #6: `<svelte:boundary onerror={…} />` now goes through `svelteHTML.createElement("svelte:boundary", {…})`, type-checking the callback against svelte/elements' boundary shape (`(error: unknown, reset: () => void) => void`). The wrong-shape handler `(error: number) => void` fires TS2322 at the directive's value position. Pre-fix `Boundary` fell through with `Component`/`SelfRef` to a bare `{` scope, losing every prop check on the boundary.
